files.content:
import { type SchemaContext } from "astro:content"
import { z } from "astro/zod"

import { blockSchema } from "@/schemas/layouts/block"
import { docSchema } from "@/schemas/layouts/doc"
import { homeSchema } from "@/schemas/layouts/home"
import { overviewSchema } from "@/schemas/layouts/overview"

export const pageSchema = (ctx: SchemaContext) =>
  z.discriminatedUnion("type", [
    blockSchema(ctx).extend({ type: z.literal("block") }),
    docSchema(ctx).extend({ type: z.literal("doc") }),
    homeSchema(ctx).extend({ type: z.literal("home") }),
    overviewSchema(ctx).extend({ type: z.literal("overview") }),
  ])

import { type SchemaContext } from "astro:content"
import { z } from "astro/zod"

import { imageSchema, seoSchema } from "@/schemas/shared"

export const baseSchema = (ctx: SchemaContext) =>
  z.object({
    title: z.string(),
    description: z.string(),
    image: imageSchema(ctx).optional(),
    seo: seoSchema(ctx).optional(),
  })

export type BaseSchema = z.infer<ReturnType<typeof baseSchema>>

import { type SchemaContext } from "astro:content"
import { z } from "astro/zod"

import { baseSchema } from "@/schemas/layouts/base"

export const blockSchema = (ctx: SchemaContext) =>
  baseSchema(ctx)
    .extend({
      category: z.string().optional(),
    })
    .strict()

export type BlockSchema = z.infer<ReturnType<typeof blockSchema>>

import { type SchemaContext } from "astro:content"
import { z } from "astro/zod"

import { baseSchema } from "@/schemas/layouts/base"

export const docSchema = (ctx: SchemaContext) => baseSchema(ctx).loose()

export type DocSchema = z.infer<ReturnType<typeof docSchema>>

import { type SchemaContext } from "astro:content"
import { z } from "astro/zod"

import { baseSchema } from "@/schemas/layouts/base"

export const homeSchema = (ctx: SchemaContext) =>
  baseSchema(ctx).extend({}).strict()

export type HomeSchema = z.infer<ReturnType<typeof homeSchema>>

import { type SchemaContext } from "astro:content"
import { z } from "astro/zod"

import { baseSchema } from "@/schemas/layouts/base"

export const overviewSchema = (ctx: SchemaContext) => baseSchema(ctx).strict()

export type OverviewSchema = z.infer<ReturnType<typeof overviewSchema>>

---
import { Font } from "astro:assets"

import type { GlobalSchema } from "@/schemas/global"
import type { BaseSchema } from "@/schemas/layouts/base"
import { getPageBreadcrumbItems, getPageSearchItems } from "@/lib/pages"
import Sidebar1 from "@/components/blocks/sidebar-1.astro"
import {
  Layout,
  LayoutBody,
  LayoutHead,
  LayoutMain,
} from "@/components/ui/layout"
import { ThemeProvider } from "@/components/ui/theme-toggle"

type Props = {
  global: GlobalSchema
  page: BaseSchema
}

const { global, page }: Props = Astro.props

const [searchItems, breadcrumbItems] = await Promise.all([
  getPageSearchItems(),
  getPageBreadcrumbItems(Astro.url.pathname),
])
---

<Layout>
  <LayoutHead {...global} {...page} {...page.seo}>
    <Fragment slot="head">
      <Font
        cssVariable="--font-geist-sans"
        preload={[{ subset: "latin", weight: "100 900", style: "normal" }]}
      />
      <Font cssVariable="--font-geist-mono" />
    </Fragment>
    <ThemeProvider />
  </LayoutHead>
  <LayoutBody>
    <Sidebar1
      logo={global.logo}
      search={{
        items: searchItems,
        ...global.sidebar.search,
      }}
      breadcrumb={{
        items: breadcrumbItems,
        menu: global.header.navigation,
      }}
      navigation={global.sidebar.navigation}
      githubRepo={global.header.githubRepo}
    >
      <LayoutMain>
        <slot />
      </LayoutMain>
    </Sidebar1>
  </LayoutBody>
</Layout>

---
import type { GlobalSchema } from "@/schemas/global"
import type { HomeSchema } from "@/schemas/layouts/home"
import Base from "@/layouts/base.astro"
import { Typography } from "@/components/ui/typography"

type Props = {
  global: GlobalSchema
  page: HomeSchema
}

const { global, page } = Astro.props
---

<Base global={global} page={page}>
  <Typography
    as="article"
    size="lg"
    class="mx-auto w-full max-w-7xl px-4 py-16 lg:px-6 [&>:is(p,ul,ol,blockquote,h1,h2)]:max-w-4xl [&>:is(p,ul,ol,blockquote,h3,h4)]:max-w-3xl [&>[data-slot='tabs']:not(:first-child)]:mt-10"
  >
    <slot />
  </Typography>
</Base>
